idea-plugin.name: Cursor AI Assistant
idea-plugin.description:
Cursor AI Assistant Plugin

Integrate Cursor's powerful AI chatbot directly into IntelliJ IDEA for enhanced coding assistance.

Features:

  • 🤖 AI-powered code suggestions and completions
  • 💬 Natural language code generation
  • 🔍 Context-aware responses based on your codebase
  • ⚡ Real-time assistance while coding
  • 📝 Code explanation and documentation generation
  • 🐛 Bug detection and fixing suggestions

How to use:

  1. Open the Cursor AI tool window from View → Tool Windows → Cursor AI
  2. Type your questions or requests in natural language
  3. Get instant AI-powered responses and code suggestions
  4. Use the generated code directly in your project
idea-plugin.change-notes:
Version 1.0.2

  • Updated for IntelliJ IDEA 2024.3+ compatibility
  • Improved Java 17 support
  • Enhanced stability and performance

Version 1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Basic chatbot integration
  • Code generation capabilities
  • Context-aware responses
